narrative:
Russell Twp township has 4,427 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
